name: ai-agent-manager-plugin
description: AI agents v12.2.0 — New capabilities increment over v12.1.0: Agent Teams graduated from experimental to recommended for 3-of-6 use cases (the agent-teams skill now ships per-pattern Recommended Use Cases plus a graduation matrix); a new Outcomes Rubric scored by a Haiku grader at the end of every Supervisor run (rubric_score in SUPERVISOR_RESULT); a new /dreaming slash command for read-only post-hoc reflection on completed sessions (no code or memory writes — review-only); and a new opt-in webhook SubagentStop hook (send-webhook.sh) that POSTs structured agent results to a user-configured endpoint for external monitoring/dashboards (disabled by default, fail-closed on errors). Preserves all v12.1.0 documentation increments (Memory Tool skill, Structured Outputs guidance, Advisor Tool SDK-only note) and all v12.0.0 reliability primitives: inter-subtask provides/requires contracts, pre-spawn dependency verification gate, scope-expansion adjudication (4-option escalation), effort-tier discipline across the 10 execution-shaped agents, hardened SubagentStop validation rejecting outputs_gap/toolset_gap drift, WORKER_RESULT schema_version 2 with outputs_verified[] + outputs_gap. Builds on v11.2.0 (opt-in GitHub Issues telemetry), v11.1.x (inline-execution guard, Phase 4.5 completion-tail invariant), v11.0 (self-heal), v10.3 layers. 12 agent roles, 49 reusable skills, 14 quality gate hooks, 11 slash commands, persistent agent memory, bundled MySQL MCP server.
